modules.sql: WITH max_date AS (SELECT MAX(ifw_effective_date) AS max_ifw_effective_date FROM compliance_events), target AS (SELECT CASE WHEN strftime('%w', max_ifw_effective_date) = '6' THEN date(max_ifw_effective_date, '-1 day') WHEN strftime('%w', max_ifw_effective_date) = '0' THEN date(max_ifw_effective_date, '-2 days') ELSE max_ifw_effective_date END AS target_date FROM max_date), customer_latest AS (SELECT id, first_name, last_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY ifw_effective_date DESC) AS rn FROM customers) SELECT ce.event_id, CAST(ce.customer_id AS INTEGER) AS customer_id, COALESCE(cl.first_name, '') AS first_name, COALESCE(cl.last_name, '') AS last_name, ce.event_type, ce.event_date, ce.status, t.target_date AS ifw_effective_date FROM compliance_events ce CROSS JOIN target t LEFT JOIN customer_latest cl ON cl.id = ce.customer_id AND cl.rn = 1 WHERE ce.ifw_effective_date = t.target_date AND ce.status = 'Open'
